summary: Checkpoint-4 repaired the governed tasks template by adding a shared governed verification contract block and wiring the checkpoint scaffold to reference it, so the active repo-index card and freshness metadata for that governed template are now stale and must be refreshed before the active verifier session can rerun on a trusted surface.
notes: Refresh scope is limited to repo-index artifacts under docs/repo-index/ for the affected governed template.
No new verifier session is allowed here; the active verifier remains 019d7184-3b9e-74e1-b55e-b7a88421be7c.
